detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['secret_detection','credential_rotation','secret_scanning','vault'].includes(d)) || profile.risk_markers.some(r=>['secret','credential'].includes(r)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(secret scan|hardcoded secret|leaked secret|credential rotation|api key|\.env|vault|secret manager|gitleaks|trufflehog|key rotation|rotate.{0,12}key|leaked credential)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.92 : 0
